name: @kentcdodds/unleashed-wifi
description: High-level Access Networks / RUCKUS Unleashed WiFi controller helpers built on top of the home connector's generic home_access_networks_unleashed_request capability.

kody.description: High-level helpers for the Access Networks / RUCKUS Unleashed AJAX API. Wraps the home connector's home_access_networks_unleashed_request capability with status reads, WLAN/AP/DPSK/rogue/alarm management, and controller lifecycle commands.
